preferences.name: apiUrl
preferences.title: API URL
preferences.description: URL of the YouTube Music API server

preferences.name: authMode
preferences.title: Auth Mode
preferences.description: localhost = pre-set cookies (no login needed); cookies = token-based login

commands.name: play-pause
commands.title: Play / Pause
commands.description: Play or pause the current track
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: next-track
commands.title: Next Track
commands.description: Skip to the next track in the queue
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: previous-track
commands.title: Previous Track
commands.description: Go back to the previous track
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: shuffle
commands.title: Toggle Shuffle
commands.description: Toggle shuffle mode on or off
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: repeat
commands.title: Cycle Repeat
commands.description: Cycle through repeat modes: off -> all -> one
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: now-playing
commands.title: Now Playing
commands.description: View current track and control playback
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search
commands.description: Search for songs, artists, and playlists
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: queue
commands.title: Queue
commands.description: View and manage the current playback queue
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: play-next
commands.title: Play Next
commands.description: Play a track next in the queue
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: playlists
commands.title: Playlists
commands.description: Browse and play your YouTube Music playlists
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: user-info
commands.title: User Info
commands.description: View your YouTube Music account info
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: lyrics
commands.title: Lyrics
commands.description: View lyrics for the currently playing track with real-time sync
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

commands.name: login
commands.title: Login
commands.description: Authenticate with YouTube Music using cookies
commands.subtitle: YouTube Music

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
